description: Placeholder rows that need an explicit product/manual policy before any publishable asset.

records.name: NEWOBJ 01
records.resolution: NEWOBJ is a placeholder/new-object hook, not a stable nautical symbol to visually promote.

semantic_brief.brief: NEWOBJ 01 is NEWOBJ 01. It is used as a NEWOBJ 01. Required geometry: symbol silhouette must match the strongest S-101/OpenCPN/Aqua Map reference. Required colours: reference-defined.
semantic_brief.required_shape: symbol silhouette must match the strongest S-101/OpenCPN/Aqua Map reference
safety_invariants: Preserve the S-57/S-52 symbol class; do not substitute a different buoy/beacon/topmark/hazard family.
Preserve load-bearing colours and colour order.
Preserve topmark count/orientation and band pattern when present.
Use provider images as semantic/shape witnesses; Helm output remains generated-owned artwork.

records.name: NEWOBJ01
records.resolution: NEWOBJ area symbol is a placeholder/new-object hook; line style is handled by the renderer, not a canonical pictogram.
